description: A selective collection of over 400 web resources archived by the National Library of Medicine beginning in 2021 related to the National Institutes of Health’s All of Us Research Program, a federally funded opportunity to advance the study of precision medicine and address the lack of diversity in biomedical research. Included in the archive are websites and social media of government and non-government organizations, journalists, scientists, and participants in the United States. Archived websites are primarily in English with a selection in Spanish. NLM will continue to develop, review, describe, and add content to the collection.
title: All of Us Research Program web archive
